steps.title: Check current netdata setup
steps.description:
Verify your netdata version and configuration:
```bash
netdata -v
```
This feature requires a working netdata installation.

steps.title: Review netdata configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant netdata configuration:
We are willing to support monitoring ***[Vsphere](https://www.vmware.com/products/vsphere.html)*** with netdata.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Vsphere monitoring
steps.description:
To begin with we need to identify what should be monitored. I see telegraf has a nice vsphere plugin (it is huge and collects a lot of metrics).

Metrics - https://github.com/influxdata/telegraf/blob/master/plugins/inputs/vsphere/METRICS.md

Any other metrics we could be interested in?

___ 
The
```yaml
jobs:
  - name     : vcenter
    url      : https://<IP>
    username : administrator@vsphere.local
    password : <PASSWORD>
    tls_skip_verify: yes
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Vsphere monitoring" is functioning correctly.
